title: Veggie Delight
description: A soy-based expansion for Farmer's Delight!
body:
![Veggie Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0658dd45ef99c93e177541416e9b331c3a00099f.png)

**Veggie Delight** is an addon for [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) that adds just one utility crop to your farm-- **soybeans!**

Whether you prefer to peacefully enjoy the company of your minecraft animal friends, or are just looking to optimize your use of farm space, Veggie Delight's soybeans and tofu both gently add to the variety of nutritious meals available, and allow you to conveniently **_grow_** the protein for your favorite Farmer's Delight dishes!

To get started, find wild soybeans in the grass as you would find wheat seeds. Dry the beans in your preferred cooking utility, then soak in a cooking pot to produce soy milk! 


![Dried soybeans cooking into soy milk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c0b6e1176930ce2a65d63005488f11bf47865796.png)


Combine this with gypsum-- a new crystal-- to create tofu! Find gypsum by using a shovel to sift sand on a cutting board.


![Sifting for gypsum with a shovel on the cutting board](https://i.imgur.com/NCh0ALX.gif)

While plain tofu can be used in new dishes like Udon and Miso Soup, a little more expertise is required for making a convincing substitute for meat. 

![Each faux meat and their corresponding recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d616ac78bedcd31f315b6a4c6b4ff95d7c07344.png)

Luckily, Wandering Traders may have recipes you can use to turn a plain block of processed soy into a convincing burger, fish fillet, or even ham! Once you have a recipe, you can always make a copy for a friend via crafting table. 
(With the comparable meat on hand, you can also "experiment" your way into your own recipe!)
